things.name: Picasso Museum Malaga
things.description: Birthplace museum of Pablo Picasso with over 200 of his works in a Renaissance palace

things.name: Alcazaba
things.description: Magnificent 11th-century Moorish palace-fortress overlooking the city and harbour

things.name: Malaga Cathedral
things.description: Renaissance cathedral nicknamed La Manquita for its unfinished second tower

things.name: Muelle Uno
things.description: Stylish harbour promenade with boutiques, restaurants and views of the Alcazaba

things.name: Centre Pompidou Malaga
things.description: Satellite of the Paris Centre Pompidou in a striking glass cube on the waterfront

things.name: Gibralfaro Castle
things.description: 14th-century Moorish castle connected to the Alcazaba with superb city panoramas

things.name: Roman Theatre
things.description: 1st-century BC Roman theatre discovered beneath the city, now an open-air museum

things.name: Caminito del Rey
things.description: Thrilling 7.7km walkway pinned to vertical gorge walls near El Chorro

things.name: La Malagueta Beach
things.description: Urban beach with fine sand just a short walk from the city centre

things.name: Atarazanas Market
things.description: 19th-century iron market hall incorporating a magnificent 14th-century Moorish arch
